member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants
member.summary: Global application-level constants used across all layers.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.ApplicationName
member.summary: The application display name.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.ApplicationVersion
member.summary: The application version.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultCurrency
member.summary: The default currency used in Fiji.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.WorkingDaysPerYear
member.summary: Number of working days assumed per year for daily rate calculations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultHoursPerWeek
member.summary: Default standard working hours per week.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultDaysPerWeek
member.summary: Default standard working days per week.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultOvertimeMultiplier
member.summary: Default overtime rate multiplier (time and a half).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.DoubleTimeMultiplier
member.summary: Double-time multiplier for public holidays.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.MoneyStoragePrecision
member.summary: Decimal precision stored in the database for monetary values.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.MoneyDisplayPrecision
member.summary: Decimal precision displayed for monetary values.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.LeaveAccrualPrecision
member.summary: Decimal precision for leave accrual stored values.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.AccountLockoutMinutes
member.summary: Maximum account lockout minutes after failed login attempts.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.MaxFailedLoginAttempts
member.summary: Maximum consecutive failed login attempts before lockout.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.LogFilePath
member.summary: Log file path pattern.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.LicenseFileExtension
member.summary: License file extension.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.DefaultPageSize
member.summary: Page size for paginated queries.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.AppConstants.MaxExportRecords
member.summary: Maximum records for an export operation.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants
member.summary: Fiji-specific tax constants sourced from FRCS regulations. These values must be reviewed and updated at the start of each fiscal year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.FnpfEmployeeRatePercent
member.summary: FNPF employee contribution rate as a percentage (8%).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.FnpfEmployerRatePercent
member.summary: FNPF employer contribution rate as a percentage (10%).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.ResidentTaxFreeThreshold
member.summary: Upper bound of the 0% PAYE tax bracket for residents (FJD).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.ResidentBracket18From
member.summary: Lower bound of the 18% PAYE tax bracket for residents (FJD).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.ResidentBracket18To
member.summary: Upper bound of the 18% PAYE tax bracket for residents (FJD).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.ResidentRate18
member.summary: Marginal rate for the 18% bracket (expressed as a fraction).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.ResidentBracket20From
member.summary: Lower bound of the 20% PAYE tax bracket for residents (FJD).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.ResidentRate20
member.summary: Marginal rate for the 20% bracket (expressed as a fraction).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.NonResidentFlatRate
member.summary: Flat PAYE rate applied to all non-resident income (20%).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.WeeklyPeriodsPerYear
member.summary: Number of weekly pay periods in a year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.FortnightlyPeriodsPerYear
member.summary: Number of fortnightly pay periods in a year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.BiMonthlyPeriodsPerYear
member.summary: Number of bi-monthly (semi-monthly) pay periods in a year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.MonthlyPeriodsPerYear
member.summary: Number of monthly pay periods in a year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.MinimumAnnualLeaveDays
member.summary: Minimum statutory annual leave entitlement in days per year (Employment Relations Act).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.MinimumSickLeaveDays
member.summary: Minimum statutory sick leave entitlement in days per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.AnnualLeaveAccrualRatePerDay
member.summary: Daily leave accrual rate for annual leave (10 days / 260 working days).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.AnnualLeaveLoadingPercent
member.summary: Annual leave loading percentage when leave is taken (if configured).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.PayeComponentCode
member.summary: System component code for PAYE tax deduction.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.FnpfEmployeeComponentCode
member.summary: System component code for FNPF employee contribution.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.FnpfEmployerComponentCode
member.summary: System component code for FNPF employer contribution.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.FijiTaxConstants.BasicSalaryComponentCode
member.summary: System component code for basic salary/wage.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.PermissionConstants
member.summary: Fine-grained permission codes used throughout the RBAC system. Format: [Module].[Action]

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.PermissionConstants.PayrollRunsView
member.summary: Permission to view payroll run records.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.PermissionConstants.PayrollRunsCreate
member.summary: Permission to create new payroll runs.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.PermissionConstants.PayrollRunsEdit
member.summary: Permission to edit / manage payroll run state.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.PermissionConstants.PayrollRunsApprove
member.summary: Permission to approve a payroll run.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Shared.Constants.PermissionConstants.PayrollRunsPost
member.summary: Permission to post (finalise) a payroll run.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for values, providing Fiji payroll-specific formatting and rounding utilities.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.RoundMoney(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Rounds a monetary value to 2 decimal places using midpoint rounding away from zero, as required by the FRCS rounding policy.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.RoundMoneyStorage(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Rounds a monetary value to 4 decimal places for internal storage, used for gross pay and intermediate calculations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.RoundLeaveAccrual(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Rounds a leave accrual quantity to 4 decimal places.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.ToFjdString(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Formats a decimal as a Fiji Dollar currency string (e.g., "$1,234.56").

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.IsPositive(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Returns true if the value is greater than zero.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.IsZeroOrNegative(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Returns true if the value is zero or negative.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Extensions.DecimalExtensions.ToFraction(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Converts a percentage value (e.g., 8.0) to its decimal fraction equivalent (0.08).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard
member.summary: Provides defensive guard clauses to validate arguments and state before executing business logic. Throws standard .NET exceptions with descriptive messages without relying on external libraries.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null.
member.param: Automatically inferred from the caller expression.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.
member.param: Automatically inferred from the caller expression.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstNegativeOrZero(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is less than or equal to zero.
member.param: Automatically inferred from the caller expression.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstNegative(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is less than zero.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstMaxLength(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if exceeds characters.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstInvalidEnum``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is not a defined member of the enumeration .

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Guards.Guard.AgainstCondition(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Throws with if is true.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Shared.Utilities.LevenshteinDistance
member.summary: Utility class to calculate Levenshtein Distance and verify fuzzy matches.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Utilities.LevenshteinDistance.Calculate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes the Levenshtein distance between two strings using an optimized two-row algorithm.
member.returns: The Levenshtein distance as an integer.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Shared.Utilities.LevenshteinDistance.IsFuzzyMatch(System.String,System.String,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Determines whether the search target matches the search source fuzzily. Rules: - Max distance of 2 for short strings (length <= 5) - 20% of length for longer strings (length > 5)
member.param: The query string or original source text.
The candidate target string to test match against.
The calculated Levenshtein distance between strings.
member.returns: True if the distance satisfies the threshold rules; otherwise, false.
